characters.name: 14th VA Soldier
characters.description: This14th VA soldieris a survivor of the invasion, former special forces soldier prior to the invasion. He is one of the soldiers in the14th Virginia. This man survived the war with the aliens, and now is a member of the U.S. Military. This man was a special operations soldier prior to the invasion. During the second year of the invasion, he made his way to the last standing naval base in Norfolk and became a member of the14th Virginia, fighting the aliens and collaborators. This soldier disarms the2nd Massachusetts Militia Regimentfighters afterKatie Marshallclaims they are all collaborators. The same night this soldier attends the court-martial representing the special forces, and can be seen sitting in the front row.

characters.name: 14th VA Soldier
characters.description: This14th VA soldieris a survivor of the invasion, former special forces soldier prior to the invasion. He is one of the soldiers in the14th Virginia. characters.name: 2nd Mass Berserker
characters.description: This2nd Mass Berserkeris a member of the2nd Massachusetts Militia Regimentand a former berserker. While the Charleston camp was in use, this Berserker was often guarding Pope's truck and spent time atThe Nest. This fighter abandonedJohn Popeafter he began to turn on the 2nd Mass and was kicked out.  This berserker is on guard duty at the from ofJohn Pope's truck during the reveal of the Liberty Tree.

characters.name: 2nd Mass Berserker
characters.description: This2nd Mass Berserkeris a member of the2nd Massachusetts Militia Regimentand a former berserker. While the Charleston camp was in use, this Berserker was often guarding Pope's truck and spent time atThe Nest. This fighter abandonedJohn Popeafter he began to turn on the 2nd Mass and was kicked out.  This berserker is on guard duty at the from ofJohn Pope's truck during the reveal of the Liberty Tree.

characters.name: Alex
characters.description: Alexwas a captive of the CharlestonEspheni Ghettoand was loyal to himself as shown when he attacked John Pope and Daniel Weaver. When the Espehni started creating ghetto camps, Alex was brought to the camp by aBlack Hornet. He followed Pope to steal his food along with three other men, when Weaver told them that he was already there to share the food with the rest of the residents in the camp, Alex denied that they were going to share it and that they were going to keep it for themselves. Alex threatened Pope with a bat, but failed to get the food as the other men were taken out. Though unseen, it is presumed that he escaped the ghetto camp.

characters.name: Alex
characters.description: Alexwas a captive of the CharlestonEspheni Ghettoand was loyal to himself as shown when he attacked John Pope and Daniel Weaver. Alex threatened Pope with a bat, but failed to get the food as the other men were taken out. Though unseen, it is presumed that he escaped the ghetto camp.

characters.name: Alexander Vlensa
characters.description:
Alexander Vlensawas a math professor, and as described by others a "conspiracy nut" who obsessed over war and weaponry. Alex was a math professor at Boston University at the same timeTom Masontaught there. WhenTom Masonjoined the 2nd Mass he suggested that they attempt to find Alex Vlensa's weapons cache, but were initially unsuccessful until they got a lead 6 months later.
It is revealed that Alex first traded guns to the antique toy shop group for some food. Later whenTomand his squad come to Alex looking for guns he gives them his stash but saves a rocket launcher for himself. Then when an attack squad ofSkittersandMechsarrives Alex andReedattack them, Alexander and Reed hold their position, killing many Mechs and Skitters. When Alexander asks Reed a question, he turns around to see Reed being killed by a Skitter, then soon after the aliens retreat to Alexander's confusing, however when he looks up he understand, and a Beamer drops a bomb right over Alexander, killing him.

characters.name: Alexis Glass-Mason
characters.description: Alexis "Lexi" Glass-Masonwas a main character andTom Mason's andAnne Glass's daughter, and half-sister toHal Mason,Ben MasonandMatt Mason. In season 3 Alexis was only a newborn, however advanced early on, which was discovered to be caused by alien DNA. Alexis was captured when Anne left Charleston with her, and at the end of season 3 she is found by Tom, and she has aged rapidly. Another sign of alien DNA was when she caused all of the eye-worms to be released fromLourdes Delgado. 22 days later, at the beginning of season 4, the 2nd Mass is split by the Espheni. She is protected byBen Mason, and has aged physically to the age of a 21 year old. Alexis has been protecting the location ofChinatown, and communicates with theEspheniwho teach her to control her powers. At the end of season 4, she sacrifices herself and destroys theEspheni Power Station.

characters.name: Alexis Glass-Mason
characters.description: Alexis "Lexi" Glass-Masonwas a main character andTom Mason's andAnne Glass's daughter, and half-sister toHal Mason,Ben MasonandMatt Mason. In season 3 Alexis was only a newborn, however advanced early on, which was discovered to be caused by alien DNA. She is protected byBen Mason, and has aged physically to the age of a 21 year old. Alexis has been protecting the location ofChinatown, and communicates with theEspheniwho teach her to control her powers. At the end of season 4, she sacrifices herself and destroys theEspheni Power Station.

characters.name: Alexis Glass-Mason (clone)
characters.description: This clone ofAlexis Glass-Masonwas ana cloneofAlexis Glass-Masoncreated toassassinateTom Masonbefore he could reach theEspheni Queen. While on patrol,MattandMaggiefind Alexis alive but injured in the woods. Maggie wants to shoot her, but Matt insists on bringing her back to base and Maggie reluctantly agrees. At the base, Alexis' mother is shocked to see her, but Colonel Weaver believes she is just anotherEspheni clonelikeKatie Marshall. At Matt's insistence, Weaver orders her locked up rather than killed. Anne later visits Alexis in the brig and demands to know what the Espheni are doing inWashington, D.C.but Alexis tells her that there was no talk of that when she was with them and begs Anne for treatment, calling her mom. Anne tells her that she is not Alexis, that the real Alexis died destroying theEspheni Power Station. Alexis tells her that it should be true but its not and begs Anne to hold her hand. Anne refuses, telling her that she has said her goodbyes and walks away. After finding out about Alexis' appearance, Tom questions her on her survival. Alexis tells Tom that she was prepared to die in the destruction of the power core, but suddenly found herself outside it with her mother. When asked how she got back to Earth, Alexis describes a similar situation to Tom's own return when theDorniasaved him. Tom questions Alexis about any higher beings that the Espheni may have mentioned during her time with them. While Alexis tells him that her powers are gone, Tom tells her he's asking what she remembers not what her powers show. Alexis tells him that the Espheni did mention something higher that they worshipped like a god. When Tom brings up the fact that they have learned thata queenhas arrived, Alexis is alarmed, telling him that its not good news. The queen is a real thing, not an idol Alexis explains and its arrival means that the Espheni objective has changed from invasion to occupation.

When Tom brings up the fact that they have learned thata queenhas arrived, Alexis is alarmed, telling him that its not good news. The queen is a real thing, not an idol Alexis explains and its arrival means that the Espheni objective has changed from invasion to occupation.

characters.name: Alicia
characters.description: Aliciais a survivor of the invasion and is currently living on a farm with her family, safe from the aliens. Alicia was a high school dropout, and met her husband in her senior year, he was the first man to open a door for her. Alicia's husband was a paratrooper and died in Afghanistan. Her mother also died of unknown reasons, which triggered Alicia and her kids to move to her fathers farm. Alicia lives on Willie McComb's 1000 acre farm, with no major roads or neighbors. The reason the aliens haven't attacked is the tree coverage, and to survive they trap rabbits, squirrels and catch crawdads in the creek to eat, and get water from the spring. Willie owns a gas generator on the farm, and was big on stockpiling before the invasion hit. Willie and Alicia have kept the war away from the kids, and have only had a few scares of explosions and rockets in the air. Alicia home schools her kids.

characters.name: Alicia

characters.name: Aloysius Murphy
characters.description: Aloysius "Tector" Murphywas a fighter in the2nd Massachusetts Militia Regiment. Although a member of the sub-groupBerserkers, he is fiercely loyal to the 2nd Mass and a brilliant marksman. Tector informs Weaver he hides his rank (former USMC gunnery sergeant) because he blames himself for losing his squad in an ambush. In Season 4, during the Espheni assault on Chinatown, Tector is recruited byTom Mason, being the best shot, to help put an end to the battle and killScorch, the commanding Overlord wanting revenge on Tom. Tector tells Tom to get him oil for the gun, and after he leaves, Tector begins to line up the shot, wearing the ghost mask to disguise himself as Tom. Tector shoots, penetrating his armor only. Scorch sends down a beamer on his location, and after sends a skitter to confirm his death. Tector takes his mask off, says "Tick Tick Boom" and blows himself up with C4 charges. Scorch confirms "Tom's" death and calls his forces away from Chinatown. Before the invasion Tector served in theUnited States Marine Corpsat the rank ofGunnery Sergeant. He served 2 tours in Iraq and Afghanistan. While in Afghanistan he and his squad were ambushed and three of his Marines were killed; as he hadn't slept in a while beforehand he felt responsible for their deaths.

characters.name: Anderson
characters.description: Andersonis a militia leader in thefirst season. He is the commander of the 10th Mass Militia. Andersen is told by to take the 10th Mass toward Marblehead, MA along the coast. He, and his Militia's fate is unknown. As the Espheni have wiped out most of the other Militias, it is unknown if Sam has survived.

characters.name: Anderson
characters.description: Andersonis a militia leader in thefirst season. He is the commander of the 10th Mass Militia. Andersen is told by to take the 10th Mass toward Marblehead, MA along the coast. He, and his Militia's fate is unknown. As the Espheni have wiped out most of the other Militias, it is unknown if Sam has survived.

characters.name: Anderzee
characters.description: Anderzeeis a survivor of the invasion soldier in the14th Virginia. Anderzee was a member in the U.S. Military prior to the invasion. During the second year of the invasion, Anderzee made his way to the last standing naval base in Norfolk and became a member of the14th Virginia, fighting the aliens and collaborators. Anderzee attends the meet and greet between the2nd Massachusetts Militia Regimentfighters and the 14th Virginia fighters. He watches asZak KageltouchBen Mason's spike, and laughs as Ben pretends to be in pain as he touches it. He attends the court-martial to determine the fate of the Masons.

characters.name: Anderzee
characters.description: Anderzeeis a survivor of the invasion soldier in the14th Virginia. Anderzee was a member in the U.S. Military prior to the invasion. characters.name: Anne Mason
characters.description: Anne Mason, formerlyAnne Yangsun Glass, is a main character in thefirst,second,third,fourthandfifthseasons. Anne was a Pediatrician before the invasion, when she joined up with the resistance she was made into the main medical doctor for the2nd Massachusetts Militia Regiment. She is currentlyTom Mason's wife, a fighter in the 2nd Mass and the mother of their hybrid daughter,Alexis Glass-Mason. She died in the last episode of season 5 in which she was also reborn. Anne was a pediatrician prior to the war living with her husband Lee and young son Sam. Anne, Scott, Kate and Sam went on a weekend trip to Lake Huntington, and while fishing with Sam, Scott caught a fish but as soon as he pulled the hook out it swam away. Anne's favorite treat was Choco pies, she says they kept her rolling in baby fat until she hit high school.

characters.name: Anne Mason

Anne was a pediatrician prior to the war living with her husband Lee and young son Sam. Anne, Scott, Kate and Sam went on a weekend trip to Lake Huntington, and while fishing with Sam, Scott caught a fish but as soon as he pulled the hook out it swam away. Anne's favorite treat was Choco pies, she says they kept her rolling in baby fat until she hit high school.

characters.name: Anthony Welker
characters.description: Anthony Welkeris a main character and a fighter in the2nd Massachusetts Militia Regiment. A former policeman from Boston, he joined theMassachusetts Militiawhen the aliensinvadedEarthand became, under CaptainDaniel Weaver, one of the commanders of the 2nd Mass. He later joined the 2nd Mass'sBerserkerswhich were commanded by former criminalJohn Pope. Pope had saved Anthony's life during thefailed attackagainst the aliens in Boston but he had also killed Anthony's friend,Click. This left Anthony both hating and feeling endebted to Pope. After the 2nd Mass joined theorganized human governmentatCharleston, Anthony was charged with tracking down anEsphenimolewho had been responsible for several acts of sabotage, including the assassination of Vice PresidentArthur Manchester. He eventually came to the conclusion thatHal Mason, who had been controlled by aneye worm, was not the true mole, allowing the 2nd Mass to figure out that the spy was really a controlled-Lourdes Delgado. After the Espheni counterattack which left the 2nd Mass divided and the organized human government destroyed, Anthony joined a group of survivors led byAnne Glass, the 2nd Mass's former doctor. They eventually reunited with the 2nd Mass inChinatownand, after the destruction of theEspheni Power Coreon the Moon, he partook in the hunt for the last remaining nests ofSkitters.

characters.name: Arthur Manchester
characters.description: Arthur Manchesterwas the former Majority Leader of the Continental Congress and the first Vice President of theNew United States. Charged with finding the Charleston mole in season 3, he is killed by the mole (later revealed asLourdes, under alien control). He wasTom Mason's former mentor and history professor before the invasion. Arthur Manchester was the Chair of the American History Department at Boston College, and one of Tom Mason's professors. At some point he wroteFrom Darkness, Democracy, a book on the American Revolution.

characters.name: Arthur Manchester
characters.description: Arthur Manchesterwas the former Majority Leader of the Continental Congress and the first Vice President of theNew United States. At some point he wroteFrom Darkness, Democracy, a book on the American Revolution.

characters.name: Avery Churchill
characters.description: Avery Churchillis an important member of the Resistance from South Carolina, she was one of the four pilots who traveled by plane to find survivors. Avery was one of four pilots that was sent by theContinental Congressto find survivors and report back to the congress. She says that there is a government and central command for the military located inCharleston, South Carolina. She flies a bright red single-seat Biplane, which she asked the2nd Massnot to touch because it is booby-trapped. She says she flies low to avoid detection. Avery attendsJimmy Boland's funeral, and before leaving for Greenland she speaks toWeaverabout the 2nd Mass, then her plane can be seen flying over Weaver and he salutes her. Her current status is unknown.

characters.name: Avery Churchill

characters.name: Ayers
characters.description: Ayersis a survivor of the invasion and soldier in the14th Virginia. Ayers was a soldier in the U.S. Military prior to the invasion. During the second year of the invasion, Ayers made his way to the last standing naval base in Norfolk and became a member of the14th Virginia, fighting the aliens and collaborators. Ayers sits down and eats dinner in the cafeteria, and listens to the conversation betweenMartyand Pvt.Grey. Ayers attends the meet and greet between the 14th Virginia soldiers and the2nd Massachusetts Militia Regiment.

characters.name: Beeman
characters.description: Beemanwas a former U.S. Military soldier, and is now member of the1st Continental Army. WhenMarshallbreaches Charleston looking forTom Mason, Beeman is one of the soldiers who stand guard by him as he speaks to Tom. OnArthur Manchester's orders, he takes Marshall to one the underground cell and locks him up. It is unknown what happened to Beeman after the Volm landed, as he has not be seen there is a good chance that he was killed in one of the Espheni attacks. AfterBen Masonalerts his father that the other de-harnessed rebels were attacked, Beeman along with many other soldiers visit the location where they were attacked. Beeman stands guard behindCole Bresslerwhile he speaks withTom Mason.

characters.name: Benjamin Hathaway
characters.description: Benjamin Hathawaywas a politician that served as the President of theUnited States. He survived the destination ofWashington, D.C.during theEspheniinvasionand managed to survive for two years Hathaway was killed inCharlestonby theEye WormscontrollingLourdes Delgado. At some point before the invasion Benjamin was elected President.

characters.name: Benjamin Hathaway
characters.description: Benjamin Hathawaywas a politician that served as the President of theUnited States. He survived the destination ofWashington, D.C.during theEspheniinvasionand managed to survive for two years Hathaway was killed inCharlestonby theEye WormscontrollingLourdes Delgado. At some point before the invasion Benjamin was elected President.

characters.name: Benjamin Mason
characters.description: Benjamin "Ben" Masonis a main character in thefirst,second,third,fourth seasonandfifth. He is the middle child of the Mason family. After the initialinvasionofEarthby theEspheni, he was captured by the invaders andharnessed. He is rescued by the2nd Massachusetts Militia Regimentand assumes a prominent role in the resistance. Despite having theHarnessremoved, Ben continues to feel its residual effects and gaining several new abilities, such as superhuman senses, greatly enhanced strength, stamina and agility, and the capacity to communicate withSkitters. Ben became a major part of theSkitter rebellionalong with several other harnessed children such asDennyand he fought against the Espheni alongside his family and the 2nd Mass after they set up inCharleston, the capital of theNew United States. After Charleston was destroyed by an Espheni counterattack against the humans and their allies, theVolm, Ben was injured protecting his sister,Lexi, and woke to find himself in a peace-haven which was later destroyed by an Espheni assault.

characters.name: Benjamin Mason
characters.description: Benjamin "Ben" Masonis a main character in thefirst,second,third,fourth seasonandfifth. He is the middle child of the Mason family. After the initialinvasionofEarthby theEspheni, he was captured by the invaders andharnessed. He is rescued by the2nd Massachusetts Militia Regimentand assumes a prominent role in the resistance. Ben became a major part of theSkitter rebellionalong with several other harnessed children such asDennyand he fought against the Espheni alongside his family and the 2nd Mass after they set up inCharleston, the capital of theNew United States. After Charleston was destroyed by an Espheni counterattack against the humans and their allies, theVolm, Ben was injured protecting his sister,Lexi, and woke to find himself in a peace-haven which was later destroyed by an Espheni assault.

characters.name: Bennett
characters.description: Bennettwas a fighter in the2nd Massachusetts Militia Regiment. WhenAnthonyarrives back from his security sweep, he mentions that they were ambushed by theSkittersand taken toScorch. Anthony mentions that the Espheni leader enjoyed seeing Bennett being burned alive by the Skitters. John PopeandSarafind Bennett's body while looking for survivors. After commenting about Bennett's demise, Pope goes to find something to bury Bennett. After burying Bennett, Pope remarks that at least the animals won't get to him.

characters.name: Bennett
characters.description: Bennettwas a fighter in the2nd Massachusetts Militia Regiment. After commenting about Bennett's demise, Pope goes to find something to bury Bennett. After burying Bennett, Pope remarks that at least the animals won't get to him.

characters.name: Beth
characters.description: Bethis a survivor of the invasion, formerly living in a Espheni ghetto with herfatheruntil the power station was destroyed. Beth was a captive of anEspheni Ghettolocated 30 miles outside ofCharleston, South Carolina. After theEspheni Power Stationwas destroyed, the walls of the ghetto went down, and Beth, her father and a group sheltered in a house, within the former ghetto. After skitters discover the location of the survivors, they are attacked in the house, however the group fends them off.Isabella, Beth,DrewandRobdecide to leave, as they will die without food and water. The group is covered by the others who decide to continue to shelter in the house. They are quickly apprehended by skitters, and are circled. A police bronco soon arrives, and two men step outside and kill the skitters.

characters.name: Beth
characters.description: Bethis a survivor of the invasion, formerly living in a Espheni ghetto with herfatheruntil the power station was destroyed. Beth was a captive of anEspheni Ghettolocated 30 miles outside ofCharleston, South Carolina. After theEspheni Power Stationwas destroyed, the walls of the ghetto went down, and Beth, her father and a group sheltered in a house, within the former ghetto. After skitters discover the location of the survivors, they are attacked in the house, however the group fends them off.Isabella, Beth,DrewandRobdecide to leave, as they will die without food and water. The group is covered by the others who decide to continue to shelter in the house. They are quickly apprehended by skitters, and are circled. A police bronco soon arrives, and two men step outside and kill the skitters.

characters.name: Bibby Pickett
characters.description: Bibby Pickettis a survivor of the invasion andDuane Pickett's only daughter. During the invasion her father decided his family's chances were better be better hiding then fighting. Sometime later, a group of men came by the farm, while Duane took them in and fed them, the robbed him and killed his wife. This caused her father to believe they needed to steal to survive. Two years later, after they robbed the Masons, she tended to the horses. She said they looked thirsty soLuketold her to go get them water, she said he broke the pump andStevegave her a wrench to fix it. When the Masons arrived at the farm,Bensneaked up on her and hadMatt Masonhold her hostage while Tom, Hal and Ben took care of the others. Matt left however to check on his brotherHal, who was struggling withGil Pickett, Matt attempted to help Hal and shot Gil. Bibby was later tied up in the basement with her father and Luke. When they went up to see Gil, Duane pulled a shotgun from under the mattress forcing the Masons to give up their guns, Bibby took Matt’s rifle. When Duane and his sons forced the Masons into the basement to kill them, Bibby tried to convince her father not to kill them. When Duane was about to shotTom Masonshe cried out distracting her father, Tom took this opportunity to take Duane’s shotgun, and Ben took Steve’s gun from him. Tom decided to spare the Picketts and left.

characters.name: Bill
characters.description: Billwas a survivor of the invasion and the father ofSheila. He was captured by a brainwashed Sheila and mutated into a human skitter. At some point during the invasion, Bill's daughter was captured and he joined a group of survivors. When Sheila graduates her re-education class, she tells Kent that she will find her parents, and save the insurgents. A few days later, Sheila gets her parents to and their camp to surrender. Bill is led to the class that Sheila graduated from, and told the class that it's better to resist than fight. After the speech they are led to a 'adult camp', and is assumed to be skitterized likeJeanne Weaver.

characters.name: Bill
characters.description: Billwas a survivor of the invasion and the father ofSheila. He was captured by a brainwashed Sheila and mutated into a human skitter. At some point during the invasion, Bill's daughter was captured and he joined a group of survivors. When Sheila graduates her re-education class, she tells Kent that she will find her parents, and save the insurgents. A few days later, Sheila gets her parents to and their camp to surrender. Bill is led to the class that Sheila graduated from, and told the class that it's better to resist than fight. After the speech they are led to a 'adult camp', and is assumed to be skitterized likeJeanne Weaver.

characters.name: Billy (Collateral Damage)
characters.description: Billywas a teenager living inCharleston, South Carolinaduring the invasion. Billy is one ofMatt Mason's close friends. Billy accompaniedMatt MasonandMarkleyto blow a hole in an abandoned house. After handing Matt the duct tape he told them math class started 10 minutes ago. Billy agreed with Markley claiming it was stupid to learn math. As Matt was about to light the dynamite Billy worried it might be too loud and they might get in trouble. He, Markley and Matt celebrated the explosion before they were caught byAnthonyand several fighters who though they were under attack. When the2nd Masswas returning to Charleston after 22 days, the Espheni attacked, deploying Mega-Mechs, Beamers, and Obelisks. With the 2nd Mass separated, most of the remaining survivors from the attack are being held in the Ghetto Camps in Charleston, run by the Espheni and the kids taken to re-education camps; leaving his fate unknown.
